subject: fix(mobile): align canvas to top of container instead of centering
body:
The canvas container uses flex-1 to fill available space, but
items-center was centering the canvas vertically, creating large empty
gaps above and below the design. Changed to items-start so the canvas
sits flush at the top, eliminating the dead space above.

Tags: mobile, ui, layout, canvas
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mobile-layout
Semver: patch
